name: Quincy

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Beth Israel Lahey Health Care Center – Quincy
majorFacilities.type: urgent care and multispecialty outpatient center

majorFacilities.name: Beth Israel Deaconess HealthCare – Quincy, Crown Colony

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: medical offices, community health centers and urgent care — no acute care hospital
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: CRITICAL: Quincy has NO acute care hospital and no emergency department. Quincy Medical Center closed inpatient care in 2014; the satellite ED closed in 2020. It is the largest Massachusetts city without one. Never name Quincy Medical Center on a live page. Crown Colony is a genuine place name but a general office park — say 'the Crown Colony area', not a medical corridor.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
